title.purpose: Section headings and workflow group labels.

body.purpose: Controls, descriptions, rows, helper text, and form content.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, metadata, status labels, and compact navigation text.

shadows.name: panel
shadows.purpose: Separates the main app shell and large persistent panels.

shadows.name: control
shadows.purpose: Gives buttons, inputs, cards, and compact surfaces low affordance.

shadows.name: selected
shadows.purpose: Marks active rows, active navigation, selected segments, and chosen workflow states.

motion.name: control-press
motion.purpose: Buttons and compact controls scale briefly on active press.

motion.name: segment-card-enter
motion.purpose: Active segment cards enter with subtle opacity and translate feedback.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Disable decorative segment animation and nonessential transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Forward action button for run, export, continue, and retry actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 40px; min-width: 40px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 14px; background: oklch(52% 0.112 248); color: oklch(99% 0.004 245); font: 500 14px/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.12); transition: transform 150ms ease-out, background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(47% 0.118 248); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.112 248); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Routine action button for diagnostics, copy, back, and neutral controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 40px; min-width: 40px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 14px; background: oklch(99% 0.004 245); color: oklch(23% 0.014 245); font: 500 14px/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.12); transition: transform 150ms ease-out, background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(96.8% 0.006 245); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.112 248); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ink Button
components.description: Serious control button for cancellation or high-weight local actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ink { min-height: 40px; min-width: 40px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 14px; background: oklch(23% 0.014 245); color: oklch(99% 0.004 245); font: 500 14px/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.12); transition: transform 150ms ease-out, background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ink:hover { background: oklch(22% 0.018 245); } .ds-btn-ink:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-ink:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.112 248); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: Compact icon-first desktop navigation item with selected and hover states.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { min-height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px; background: transparent; color: oklch(49% 0.017 245); font: 500 12px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: transform 150ms ease-out, background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex: none; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(99% 0.004 245); color: oklch(23% 0.014 245); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: oklch(99% 0.004 245); color: oklch(23% 0.014 245); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(55,102,190,0.24), 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.10); } .ds-nav-item:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.112 248); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: Binary workflow and settings control with visible checked state.
components.css: .ds-toggle { position: relative; display: inline-flex; width: 56px; height: 40px; align-items: center; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(92.8% 0.008 245); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.12); transition: transform 150ms ease-out, background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-toggle span { position: absolute; left: 6px; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(99% 0.004 245); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.12); transition: transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-toggle-on { background: oklch(52% 0.112 248); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(55,102,190,0.24), 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.10); } .ds-toggle-on span { transform: translateX(20px); } .ds-toggle:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.112 248); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Workflow Step Row
components.description: Selectable workflow row with numeric status marker and compact metadata.
components.html:
1
Fetch source

remote_video.fetch

Download source media for processing.
Enabled
components.css: .ds-step-row { min-height: 88px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 28px minmax(0,1fr) auto; gap: 12px; align-items: center; border-radius: 7px; padding: 12px; background: oklch(99% 0.004 245); color: oklch(23% 0.014 245); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.12); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-step-row-selected { background: oklch(93.5% 0.026 248); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(55,102,190,0.24), 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.10); } .ds-step-number { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(52% 0.112 248); color: oklch(99% 0.004 245); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-step-row strong { display: block; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-step-row p, .ds-step-row small { display: block; margin: 4px 0 0; color: oklch(49% 0.017 245); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-step-chip { border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 8px; background: oklch(92% 0.046 248); color: oklch(52% 0.112 248); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Runtime Log Row
components.description: Dark runtime output row for backend events and progress logs.
components.css: .ds-log-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 132px 72px minmax(0,1fr); gap: 8px; align-items: start; padding: 2px 0; background: oklch(22% 0.018 245); color: oklch(92% 0.009 245); font: 12px/1.55 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; } .ds-log-row span { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; color: oklch(70% 0.018 245); } .ds-log-row b { border-radius: 5px; padding: 2px 6px; background: oklch(27% 0.018 245); color: oklch(70% 0.018 245); text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 10px; line-height: 20px; } .ds-log-row p { margin: 0; min-width: 0; overflow-wrap: anywhere; white-space: pre-wrap; }

components.name: Segment Review Card
components.description: Editable subtitle segment card with active playback progress.
components.html: 00:12.400 - 00:15.900Segment 4
components.css: .ds-segment-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 7px; padding: 12px; background: oklch(99% 0.004 245); color: oklch(23% 0.014 245); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.12); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-segment-card-active { background: oklch(93.5% 0.026 248); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(55,102,190,0.24), 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.10); } .ds-segment-progress { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; height: 4px; width: 46%; background: oklch(52% 0.112 248); } .ds-segment-card header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; color: oklch(52% 0.112 248); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-segment-card label { display: grid; gap: 6px; margin-top: 12px; color: oklch(49% 0.017 245); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-segment-card .ds-translation { color: oklch(52% 0.112 248); } .ds-segment-card textarea { min-height: 58px; resize: none; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px; background: oklch(96.8% 0.006 245); color: oklch(23% 0.014 245); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(38,45,55,0.10); font: 400 14px/1.35 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-segment-card textarea:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.112 248); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Compact settings and workflow configuration field.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: oklch(49% 0.017 245); font: 600 11px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-field input { min-height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 12px; background: oklch(96.8% 0.006 245); color: oklch(23% 0.014 245); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(38,45,55,0.12); font: 400 14px/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; text-transform: none; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.112 248); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Inline determinate progress for tasks, model downloads, and runtime logs.
components.css: .ds-progress { height: 8px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(92.8% 0.008 245); } .ds-progress span { display: block; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; background: oklch(52% 0.112 248); transition: width 200ms ease-out; }

narrative.overview:
OpenBBQ should feel like a focused desktop workspace: quiet, precise, and native-adjacent. It borrows macOS discipline through restrained surfaces, clear hierarchy, soft functional elevation, and controls that make repeated media workflow work feel calm. It does not imitate the operating system; it translates that cleanliness into OpenBBQ's source import, workflow arrangement, task monitoring, review, and settings screens.

The system is dense because the product is operational. Density is acceptable when structure is clear: source, state, next action, and output must remain visible without decorative competition. The surface should feel local-first, inspectable, and trustworthy, never like a web campaign or a generic terminal skin.
keyCharacteristics: Blue-tinted neutrals and one restrained operational accent.
Dark surfaces reserved for machine output, media preview, and logs.
Visible state through color, shape, icon, copy, and position.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Workbench Blue is the only general-purpose accent. Do not introduce extra decorative hues for variety.

rules.name: The Log Island Rule
rules.body: Dark surfaces are allowed for runtime logs, media preview, and machine output. They are forbidden as the default app theme.

rules.name: The Native Type Rule
rules.body: Do not add decorative display fonts. OpenBBQ earns trust by looking like a serious desktop tool, not a campaign page.

rules.name: The Short Line Rule
rules.body: Descriptive copy should stay compact. Long prose belongs in docs, not dense workflow screens.

rules.name: The Utility Depth Rule
rules.body: Shadows exist to separate, select, or show state. Decorative depth, glass cards, and floating marketing panels are prohibited.

dos: Do preserve the native-adjacent desktop restraint: quiet surfaces, compact controls, and visible state.
Do use the existing OKLCH tokens as the source of truth.
Do reserve `log-bg` and `log-panel` for logs, media preview, and machine output.
Do communicate automation status with labels, icons, progress, and placement, not color alone.
Do keep radii at 8px or below for panels and controls.
Do keep repeated workflow screens dense but structured.
donts: Don't use flashy gradients, noisy decorative effects, or Chinese internet tool-site styling.
Don't make the desktop app feel like a marketing page, a dark terminal skin, or a pile of identical promotional cards.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative blur, or hero-metric templates.
Don't use `border-left` or `border-right` greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't introduce a full dark theme by spreading runtime log colors into normal workflow screens.
Don't add decorative fonts, oversized hero type, or sparse landing-page spacing to operational screens.
